MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDMAN, MARGO DOING BUSINESS AS ALIMAR ASSOCIATES HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-05-2009.
